problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
